name: Oyster Soup with Fresh & Smoked Oysters
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Bacon, cut into thin strips
1 large Onion, cut into fine dice
1 large Leek (white part only), sliced thin
1 large Red potato, peeled and cut into ½-inch dice
7 oz Smoked oysters, well rinsed in cold water and gently patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a 3-quart pot over medium-high heat until lightly browned, about 4 minutes.
2. Add the onion and leek; cook until softened, about 4 minutes, stirring often.
3. Add the potato, cream, milk, and clam juice; bring to boil.
4. Simmer, uncovered, until the potato is just short of cooked, about 8 minutes.
5. The soup can be made ahead up to this point and refrigerated overnight. Gently reheat if chilled.
6. Add the spinach and fresh and smoked oysters; cook just until the fresh oysters are cooked, about 1 minute.
7. Add additional clam juice if needed for consistency.
8. Season with salt and white pepper to taste. Serve immediately.
Yield: 8 cups
PER 1-CUP SERVING: 415 calories, 19 g protein, 22 g carbohydrate, 28 g fat (14 g saturated), 137 mg cholesterol, 515 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
